name: Air Jordan 3 Retro 'White Cement Reimagined'
description: The Air Jordan 3 Retro 'White Cement Reimagined' brings back one of the original colorways, celebrating the 35th anniversary of the AJ3. Designed by Tinker Hatfield, the Reimagined iteration is built to the original 1988 specs. Returning true to form, the white leather upper pairs with elephant print overlays on the heel and toe while hits of Varsity Red appear on the lace loops and the Jumpman logo on the tongue.
